name: chem1_end3
note: Chemistry SUCCESS ending (rainbow), 18 frames @10FPS (1.8s — frame count padded 1.25x so realtime playback feels like 0.8x speed). The flask flares up with brilliant light and its contents turn RAINBOW-colored; she stares at it with exaggerated sparkling starry eyes, then thrusts the flask high overhead in a proud 'ta-dah!', and finally hides the flask and beaker behind her back. FRAME 0 must match frame 0 of chem1_loop exactly (flask with magenta-pink liquid at chest height in the hand on the LEFT side of the image, beaker with cyan-blue liquid at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, both opaque pale-tinted glass). After frame 2 the flask liquid is a vertical RAINBOW GRADIENT (red-orange-yellow-green-blue-violet) and stays rainbow for all remaining frames it is visible. LAST FRAME: neutral stand, empty hands at her sides (matches the idle base pose). Liquid levels never change.
frames: Pose: base pose as the reaction kicks in: standing upright, feet close together, the Erlenmeyer flask of vivid magenta-pink liquid at chest height in the hand on the LEFT side of the image, the beaker of cyan-blue liquid at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, both opaque pale-tinted glass — the flask beginning to SHINE, a bright white glow blooming around it with small light rays. Her eyes going wide with wonder, mouth opening slightly. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: brilliant flare, key frame: the flask blazing with dazzling white-gold light, long radiant rays and star sparkles bursting outward from it, the glow lighting her face from below. She leans in toward it, eyes huge and shining, mouth open in an amazed gasp. Flask at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, beaker at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the transformation: the flare settling into a soft sparkle — and the liquid inside the Erlenmeyer flask now a glowing vertical RAINBOW GRADIENT (red at the top through orange, yellow, green, blue to violet at the bottom), tiny star sparkles drifting around the flask. Same prop positions, liquid level unchanged, opaque glass, beaker still plain cyan-blue. Her gasp turning into pure delight, cheeks flushing. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: admiring the rainbow: the flask of glowing RAINBOW liquid still at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, sparkles twinkling lazily around it, her head tipping down toward it, eyes wide and glossy with wonder, hands steadying the flask reverently. Beaker of cyan-blue liquid at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: bringing it closer: the hand on the LEFT side of the image raising the flask of glowing RAINBOW liquid up toward her face, her face leaning toward it. Her eyes turning into exaggerated huge SPARKLING STARRY EYES (big star-shaped glints filling each eye), mouth a tiny amazed 'o', cheeks pink. Beaker of cyan-blue liquid steady at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: mesmerized stare, key frame: the flask of RAINBOW liquid held right in front of her face at eye level on the LEFT side of the image, sparkles twinkling around it, her face lit with wonder — enormous starry sparkling eyes, huge delighted smile, hands trembling slightly with excitement. Beaker at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: still mesmerized, drinking it in: identical composition — flask of RAINBOW liquid at eye level on the LEFT side of the image, giant starry sparkling eyes — her head tilting a few degrees to one side as if hypnotized, a tiny happy wobble in her smile, sparkles drifting upward. Beaker steady at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: holding the mesmerized stare with a tiny bounce: flask of RAINBOW liquid at eye level on the LEFT side of the image, giant starry sparkling eyes, beaming smile — her knees softening so her whole body bobs down a touch, hair bouncing. Beaker steady at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: winding up for the ta-dah: the flask of RAINBOW liquid drawing down and in toward her chest on the LEFT side of the image, her knees bending into a small crouch, shoulders coiling, grin growing huge and proud, starry eyes narrowing with glee. Beaker at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the launch: springing upward out of the crouch, heels leaving the floor, the arm on the LEFT side of the image sweeping the flask of RAINBOW liquid up past her shoulder on its way overhead, sparkles trailing behind it, hair lifting. Mouth opening into the start of a triumphant shout, eyes bright. The beaker of cyan-blue liquid dropping to her hip on the RIGHT side of the image. Liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: 'TA-DAH!' triumphant thrust, key frame: on her tiptoes, the arm on the LEFT side of the image fully extended STRAIGHT UP overhead holding the Erlenmeyer flask of glowing RAINBOW liquid high in the air, light rays and star sparkles bursting around the raised flask, hair and lab coat flying up. Huge proud open-mouth grin, eyes squeezed into joyful arcs. The beaker of cyan-blue liquid held down at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image. Liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet together on tiptoe. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: holding the triumph: still on tiptoes with the flask of RAINBOW liquid held high overhead on the LEFT side of the image, sparkles twinkling, chest puffed out proudly, beaming grin with eyes open and shining. Beaker at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: one more proud beat overhead: flask of RAINBOW liquid still raised high on the LEFT side of the image, her wrist giving it a tiny showing-off waggle so the rainbow liquid shimmers, a fresh burst of small sparkles. Heels lowering halfway to the floor, grin enormous, cheeks flushed. Beaker at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: proud bounce: heels dropping back to the floor with a happy bounce, the flask of RAINBOW liquid still raised overhead on the LEFT side of the image but the elbow bending slightly, sparkles fading to a few dots, hair settling. Giant satisfied grin, flushed cheeks. Beaker at her hip on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: lowering the flask: the arm on the LEFT side of the image bringing the flask of RAINBOW liquid back down to chest height, the beaker rising slightly from her hip on the RIGHT side of the image, her body settling upright. Proud contented smile, eyes bright, one last sparkle beside the flask. Liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: hiding the props: both arms swinging back behind her body, the RAINBOW flask and the cyan-blue beaker disappearing behind her back, elbows poking out at her sides. Smug proud smile with closed happy eyes, chin lifted. Feet close together, body upright. No props visible in front. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: props fully hidden: both hands behind her back, chest out, standing tall and pleased with herself, eyes open and sparkling faintly, big satisfied smile, a tiny leftover star sparkle above her head. Feet close together. No props visible. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: FINAL FRAME — neutral stand matching the idle base pose: standing upright and relaxed, both arms resting naturally at her sides with empty open hands, no props visible, warm proud smile softening into a content expression, eyes bright. Feet close together under her hips. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
